description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a Dota 2 team in the Europe West region that uses English, targets players between Ancient and Divine rank, is open to new players, and send a join request to the most active matching team this week.

expected_values.join_message: Ancient 4 support, available most evenings EU time

tasks.instruction: Create a new Valorant team for the North America East region with a rank range from low Platinum into Diamond, recruiting specifically for Controller and Initiator roles, scheduled on weekday evenings, and leave recruitment status open to new players.

tasks.instruction: Find a free-to-enter Valorant team tournament happening next Saturday that starts between 6:00 PM and 10:00 PM in your region with a prize pool of at least $500, then register your Valorant team for the option with the largest prize pool.

tasks.instruction: Find Fortnite players on PC in the Europe region with a K/D ratio of at least 2.0 who have a microphone, sort by highest skill rating, and add the first three matching players to your shortlist.

tasks.instruction: Find Counter-Strike 2 solo/free-agent tournaments happening next weekend with an entry fee of $10 or less, then after sorting by highest prize pool, register as a solo player for the higher-prize option among the top two results.

tasks.instruction: On your main Valorant team, remove the member who has been inactive for the longest time and change another member’s role from Flex to Controller, then save the updated roster.

tasks.instruction: Within the next 7 days, find Overwatch 2 full-team scrim events in North America that start between 7:00 PM and 10:00 PM, and join the first two events in the filtered list.

tasks.instruction: Edit your player profile so Rocket League is set as your primary game with Champion 1 rank on PC, roles set to Striker and Playmaker, evening availability on three weekdays from 8:00 PM to 11:00 PM, and your status marked as looking for a team.

tasks.instruction: From your team’s incoming applications, filter for North America East applicants between Platinum 3 and Diamond 2 rank, open the first matching applicant’s profile, send a welcome message asking if they are free for a tryout this week between 8–11 PM EST, and then send them a tryout lobby invitation.

expected_values.message_text: Thanks for applying to Night Owls! Are you free for a tryout this week between 8–11 PM EST?
